title: alchemilla vulgaris f. tenuis
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. tenuis, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe, with a unique characteristic of having fringed leaves that hold water droplets after rainfall. The medicinal properties of Lady's Mantle include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of consuming Lady's Mantle tea or infusions include reducing menstrual cramps, promoting digestive health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Lady's Mantle include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic purposes.
